info.english_meaning: to understand clearly to be related to be connected to carry germs
info.hindI_arTa: acCI taraha se samaJanA saMbaMDI honA saMsargI honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kecidamuM na paWanti  ' secane samavAye ca sacate sacati kramAt ' (Slo. 46) iti devaH  mADavIyaDAtuvfttikAraH amuM DAtuM parasmEpadinaM sewaM ca manyate  saH liKati - ' paciM vacim ityAdO vyAGraBUtikArikAyAM cakArAntAnAm aniwAM parigaRanAt sew  aniwAM maDye pAWastu svaritetattvasAmyAt ' iti  bAlamanoramAyAM tu asya sewtvam uktam  aniwtve tu sAtA sakzyati sakzIzwa asAkzIt - asakta ityAdIni rUpARi BaveyuH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apa dvezo apa hvaro'nyavratasya saScire' (f॰5.20.2) te vfdDA anyavratasya dvezaM kOwilyaM cApasacante tato'petA Bavanti na tAByAM samavetA BavantItyAha atrApaSabdo DAtvarTaM viparItayati
'jyotizmatImaditiM DArayatkzitiM svarvatImA sa cete dive dive jAgfvAMsA dive dive' (f0 11363) Asacete gavezayete mfgayete mArgayete
'arizyanto ni pAyuBiH sacemahi' (f0 82511) nisacemahi nitarAM samavetA Bavema
